prompt: From docs/ears/member/MemberAdmissionApproval-EARS-Specification.md, produce a catalog of every endpoint it documents with the source file for each. Output to docs/ears/MemberAdmissionApproval-Catalog.md.

assertions.text: Output catalog markdown file was produced
Table has the four required columns
approveMemberAdmission and approveMemberUpdate each appear as their own row on DcsMemberAdmissionBufferController.groovy
CreateMemberAdmissionApiAction appears as its own endpoint row with its own source file
UpdateMemberAdmissionApiAction appears as its own endpoint row with its own source file
check_catalog.py passes (exit 0) against the output with the single input
